title: MDN: Drag Operations
description: Complete guide to implementing drag-and-drop operations with the HTML DnD API.

title: MDN: DataTransfer
description: Reference for the DataTransfer object used during drag-and-drop operations.

title: MDN: DragEvent
description: Reference for the DragEvent interface and its properties.

title: WHATWG: Drag and Drop Specification
description: Official HTML specification for drag-and-drop behavior.

title: HTML5 Drag and Drop API Tutorial (freeCodeCamp)
description: Comprehensive tutorial covering all aspects of the HTML5 Drag and Drop API.

title: Drag and Drop JavaScript (Traversy Media)
description: Practical tutorial building a drag-and-drop list and file upload interface.

title: JavaScript Drag and Drop Explained (Web Dev Simplified)
description: Clear explanation of drag-and-drop events, DataTransfer, and common patterns.

title: Build a Kanban Board with Drag and Drop (freeCodeCamp)
description: Step-by-step guide to building a full Kanban board with drag-and-drop functionality.

title: Native HTML Drag and Drop API (CSS-Tricks)
description: In-depth article on implementing drag-and-drop with practical code examples.

title: File Drag and Drop (MDN)
description: Guide to handling file drops from the operating system into web applications.

title: Touch Events for Drag and Drop (W3C)
description: W3C specification for implementing touch-based drag-and-drop on mobile devices.

title: SortableJS
description: Popular JavaScript library for sortable drag-and-drop lists with touch support.

title: Dragula
description: Lightweight drag-and-drop library that supports both mouse and touch events.

title: react-beautiful-dnd
description: React library for beautiful drag-and-drop interfaces (maintained by Atlassian).

title: Interact.js
description: JavaScript library for drag-and-drop, resizing, and multi-touch gestures.

title: Dropzone.js
description: Popular library for file upload drop zones with preview, progress, and validation.

title: Drag and Drop Test Tool
description: Online demo and test tool for SortableJS drag-and-drop functionality.

title: Accessible Drag and Drop (Smashing Magazine)
description: Guide to making drag-and-drop interfaces accessible to keyboard and screen reader users.

title: Drag and Drop Performance Tips (Perf Planet)
description: Performance optimization techniques for drag-and-drop operations in the browser.

title: HTML Drag and Drop: The Missing Manual (SitePoint)
description: Comprehensive tutorial covering edge cases and real-world drag-and-drop patterns.
